mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mt_meter_match (id, archive_id, company_id, meter_type, create_by, create_time) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), #{entity.id}, id, '31', #{entity.createBy}, NOW() FROM sys_company WHERE code = 'XABL' AND nature = '2'
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.code, a.name, a.specification, a.model, a.type, a.is_action, a.install_site, a.seq, a.is_enabled FROM mt_tc_valve a INNER JOIN mt_meter_match m ON a.id = m.archive_id INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.dept_id = m.company_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND m.meter_type = '31'
